title: Maxillaria adendrobium

taxonomy: Maxillaria adendrobium is a species of orchid in the genus Maxillaria. The genus Maxillaria is classified within the subfamily Maxillarioideae, which is part of the family Orchidaceae. This subfamily is characterized by its unique flowers and growth habits. The Maxillarioideae subfamily is further divided into several tribes, with Maxillaria being part of the Maxillarieae tribe.
